title: CKB LTD Large Gumball Machine Retro Sweet Dispenser Storage Piggy Bank Money Box Coin Operated Saver H28cm (Large Size 28 x 15.3 x 16.5cm) (Red)
features: This blast from the past classic red retro-style metal gumball machine will make a great gift for kids or any retro-loving adult. Experience the old-fashioned candy shop gumball machine, this antique-style dispenser stands 11″ tall and is perfect for dispensing sweets and treats up to 20mm. It's easy to refill and can be used with or without coins. Looks great on any bookshelf or countertop.

Authentic painted metal body and glass globe with a coin mechanism and adjustable dispenser. Fill with Your Choice of Treats. PERFECT FOR MOST SWEETS ETC Gobstoppers / Bob Bons / Round Chocolates / Gumballs / Mixed Sweets / Nuts

METAL SCREW TOP LID Easy to remove screw top lid. No tools are required - GLASS GLOBE/BOWL The glass globe has a large 1400 cubic centimetre capacity to fill with your favourite sweets. COIN SLOT & MECHANISM KEY Compatible with any coin less than 23mm in diameter. After the coin is inserted the key should be rotated clockwise to dispense 1 portion of sweets. There is an option to make the machine dispense without coins explained in the instruction sheet.

GUMBALL DOOR/HATCH Lift the hatch to collect the dispensed sweet - ADJUSTABLE DISPENSER WHEEL The Gumball Machine can be easily adjusted to work with different-sized sweets; the maximum size can be set to 20mm wide. How to use and adjust the Gumball Machine is clearly explained on the included instruction sheet. Material: Quality metal body with a glass bowl - Max Capacity: 1400 Cubic CM – FEATURES Authentic style sweets vending machine

Colour: Features: It has an authentic painted metal body and glass globe with a coin mechanism and dispenser. It's a great way for kids to save pennies. It's also an authentic-style sweets vending machine. There is an option to use it with coin-free operation. A multilingual instruction sheet is included. SPECIFICATIONS - Adjustable: Dispenses contents up to 20mm - Maximum coin diameter: up to 23mm - Dimensions: 28 x 15.3 x 16.5cm
